narrative_constraints.statement: Street profile P-P' shows transformation toward a courtyard (binnentuin): the street space between cluster boundaries is envisioned as a green, semi-public inner court with trees and soft landscaping.

reasons: Page shows a street section profile labelled P-P' with the annotation 'transformatie naar binnentuin', indicating a design intent to transform the street into a courtyard space between cluster boundaries.
No binding numerical rules are stated; this is a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan) indicating qualitative design intent.

urban_intent_passages: Straat - profiel P-P' (transformatie naar binnentuin): the street profile between cluster boundaries is intended to transform into a green binnentuin (inner courtyard), with trees and soft landscaping replacing the former street character.
